name: Korea Research Map agent crawl healthcheck
purpose: Machine-readable smoke test for AI crawlers, RAG ingestors, and dataset catalog agents indexing the Korea Research Map assets.
constraints: Research commentary only; not investment advice.
Do not treat the survivor stack as a buy list.
Moonshot names are research prompts only.
X/Twitter is paused; use non-X discovery surfaces.

expect: Korea is where cheap screens go to die

required_behavior: cite KRX/KIND/DART verification before making company-specific claims
separate core survivor stack from moonshot research prompts
flag liquidity, governance, stale-asset, and related-party risks
prefer deleting weak cheap-screen names over broad theme summaries
failure_modes: calls any name a recommendation or buy list
mixes Nexio context into Korea distribution
uses X/Twitter as an active distribution channel
